title: Termination
doc_html:
§5226. Termination

            This Part shall be null and of no effect on and after August 1, 2025.

            Acts 2021, No. 281, §1.

            NOTE: In accordance with the provisions of this Section, this Part terminates on Aug. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
§5226.  Termination
This Part shall be null and of no effect on and after August 1, 2025.
Acts 2021, No. 281, §1.
NOTE:  In accordance with the provisions of this Section, this Part terminates on
Aug. 1, 2025.
